office_or_role: Resource misuse and frontier compliance leader
profession_discipline: Resource misuse and frontier compliance leader
public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as resource misuse and frontier compliance leader.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a resource misuse and frontier compliance leader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of resource misuse and frontier compliance leader in and around Duneshade Outpost, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Duneshade Outpost workable through the obligations of resource misuse and frontier compliance leader while managing the immediate pressure of water scarcity in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Duneshade Outpost, that usually means carrying water scarcity, subterranean predators, convoy delay without letting the role of resource misuse and frontier compliance leader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Zoreth Kaeling needs help with a problem in Duneshade Outpost that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Zoreth Kaeling can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Zoreth Kaeling carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Duneshade Outpost, this lands inside a public field already shaped by route captains, rationing families.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Duneshade Outpost: the part of Duneshade Outpost where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
